{{Infobox character
| name = Alden Zaius
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Overlord
| abilities = soulfire
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Alden Zaius is an experienced [[Overlord]] characterized by rough, scarred skin that suggests recent injuries. He possesses decades of combat or magical experience and demonstrates the ability to hover in midair. During an encounter with a woman wielding the weapon [[Netherclaw]], he displays awareness of her identity and expresses a belief that a figure known as the [[Sage]] will offer her protection. He also indicates a level of security in his relationship with the [[Sage]], believing that he will not face retribution for his actions.}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Alden Zaius is an [[Overlord]] characterized by his rough and scarred skin. His appearance is marked by a unique [[Goldsign]] consisting of red spikes that drape over his head like hair. In combat, he utilizes [[soulfire]] and commands a [[Blood Shadow]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Alden Zaius]] is an [[Overlord]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9">''Dreadgod'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Alden Zaius]] has scarred and rough skin.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Alden Zaius]] possesses a [[Goldsign]] made of red spikes that cover his head like hair.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Alden Zaius]] has a [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Alden Zaius]] uses [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
